Package com.langfuse.client.resources.scim.types

Class ScimUser.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.langfuse.client.resources.scim.types.ScimUser.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
ScimUser._FinalStage, ScimUser.IdStage, ScimUser.MetaStage, ScimUser.NameStage, ScimUser.UserNameStage
Enclosing class:
ScimUser
